source_pr.title: session: add indexes for `mysql.analyze_jobs`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/57996

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

This PR added two indexes for the `mysql.analyze_jobs` to speed up queries.

I also bumped the bootstrap version from 239 to 140.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] [Manual test1](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/58134#issuecomment-2545067361)
- [x] [Manual test2](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/58134#issuecomment-2545334778)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
为 `mysql.analyze_jobs` 添加索引加速查询
Add some indexes to `mysql.analyze_jobs` to speed up queries
```

symptoms: sql := fmt.Sprintf("select job_meta from mysql.tidb_ddl_history where job_id >=%d and table_name in ('upgrade_tbl', 'upgrade_tbl1') order by job_id", jobID) (pkg/session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go)
failure_signature: sql := fmt.Sprintf("select job_meta from mysql.tidb_ddl_history where job_id >=%d and table_name in ('upgrade_tbl', 'upgrade_tbl1') order by job_id", jobID) (pkg/session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql := fmt.Sprintf("select job_meta from mysql.tidb_ddl_history where job_id >=%d and table_name in ('upgrade_tbl', 'upgrade_tbl1') order by job_id", jobID) (pkg/session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go)
